# Segment Portfolio Annual Report
## 2016–2025

*Generated by Phase 10a segment customer model — 295 initial customers across 5 segments.*

---

## Executive Summary

This report covers 2016–2025 (10 calendar years, the last partial).
The business survived the full window.

**Portfolio economics**
- Starting treasury: £508,300.00
- Final treasury: £618,805.05
  (£110,505.05 net change)
- Gross margin (whole window): £139,159.73
- Capital costs: (£28,654.68) — 20.6% of gross
- Net margin: £110,505.05 — 3.2% of revenue
- Fixed overhead (whole window): (£5,700.00)
- Net after overhead: £104,805.05
- Risk committee (Context Handshake) interventions: 135
- Hedge effectiveness (whole window): hedging cost £550,725.93 vs. a fully unhedged book (actual net £110,505.05 vs. naked net £661,230.98)

**Customer book**
- Initial portfolio: 295 customers
- Final portfolio: 159 customers
